title: Character Chat
summary: An intuitive ChatGPT interface for talking with fictional and historical characters.
description: Character Chat appears in Phil's resume as one of his early OpenAI-driven web products. It focuses less on infrastructure than on interaction design, prompt experience, and making AI chat feel immediately playful and understandable.
Even without a current public repo, it is an important city in the portfolio because it shows Phil's pattern of shipping user-facing AI experiences early.

media.alt: A reconstructed screenshot representing the Character Chat interface.
media.caption: An archival-style reconstruction of the playful character-chat experience.

media.alt: A coastal observatory city representing Character Chat.
media.caption: A harbor city for persona design, chat UX, and user-facing AI play.

greatWorks.title: Persona Harbor
greatWorks.summary: A fast, approachable interface for talking with fictional and historical characters.

highlights: Turned ChatGPT into a quicker, more approachable character-based experience.
Showed early product instinct around consumer-facing AI UX.
Balanced novelty with a simple interaction model.
productionQueue: Revisit persona systems with newer model capabilities.
Rebuild the interaction layer with better memory and controls.

architectureNotes: Designed as a user-facing AI product rather than a backend-first experiment.
